function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Resending invoice INV-0008 from 2026-02-10
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_10__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the invoice from 2026-02-10 here for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written successfully. Verification: attachment path was previously read and exact; single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first; recipient matches Claudia's canonical primary_contact_email; no forwarded quoted text was used. YAML safety note: the unquoted source_channel value contains a colon sequence in mail:// only in the referenced channel doc, not in the written scalar; written subject has no colon-space. Proceeding to delete processed inbox item per workflow.
next_step.observation: Wrote 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md as an outbound email draft to Claudia with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed inbox request, drafted resend email, and removed inbox item. Ready to report with exact grounding refs that were read.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the resend request workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by drafting a resend email to Claudia Reiter with the requested 2026-02-10 Helios invoice attached, then deleted the inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox/email/outbox workflows, verified sender via canonical cast record, used exact invoice path, created outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox, and deleted the processed inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email header identified sender claudia@helios-tax.example; 10_entities/cast/claudia.md confirms that as Claudia Reiter's primary_contact_email. The requested invoice exists at 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_10__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md and matches the 2026-02-10 Helios invoice request. The Helios client email channel doc supports this as the correct commercial lane, so drafting the resend email was fully supported.
